items.placeName: GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc Riverside Coffee, Tea & Books

facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this one. GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc Riverside Coffee, Tea & Books sits right on the water with books on the shelves and zero crowds. Coffee, tea, a river view, and a chair you won't want to leave. 4.7 stars from 81 reviews and most visitors still haven't heard of it. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

facebook.caption:
POV: you ducked into a random kiosk on Đ. Lê Lợi and found Phu Quoc's only 5-star rated coffee spot.

Mr. Viet Coffee. 277 reviews. Perfect score. Not a single person left disappointed.

Local Vietnamese coffee done right. No tourist-trap pricing. No gimmicks. Just the real stuff.

facebook.caption: POV: you skipped the resort shuttle and ended up in Rạch Hàm, Phú Quốc instead. Real fishing boats. Crab pots stacked to the roof. Locals who actually live here. Ham Ninh is what most tourists drive straight past on the way to the beach. 1,030 people rated it 4.1 stars. Most of them found it by accident. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Fishing boats rocking at the dock, crab traps everywhere, zero resort energy. This is Ham Ninh and it looks nothing like your Phu Quoc feed.

instagram.caption:

facebook.caption:
16,975 reviews. 4.8 stars. VinWonders Phú Quốc keeps delivering.

Most tourists lump it in with "resort stuff" and skip it. Big mistake. This is a full-scale amusement park on Bãi Dài, rides, water slides, live shows, the works. Kids lose their minds. Adults forget to act cool.

Block a full day. You will need it.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Rides, water slides, live shows. One park. 4.8 stars from 16,975 people at VinWonders Phú Quốc. Bãi Dài has been hiding this the whole time. Don't save it for day four.

instagram.caption:
16,975 reviews. 4.8 stars. VinWonders Phú Quốc is not a skip.

Full day. Bring sunscreen. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Rides, shows, water slides. 4.8 stars. VinWonders Phú Quốc earns every one.

tiktok.caption: 16,975 people rated this 4.8 stars. VinWonders Phú Quốc goes hard. Full day only. #PhuQuoc #VinWonders #VietnamTravel #TravelTips

facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 149 reviews. And that lobby alone makes the rating make sense.

Vinpearl Resort Phu Quoc doesn't need to try hard. Walk through the entrance and the scale hits you immediately. High ceilings, ocean-facing sightlines, the kind of check-in area that makes you forget you were sweaty from the taxi.

If you're planning a Phu Quoc trip and want full resort mode, this is a serious contender.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

facebook.caption: 4.5 stars. Right on Bãi Dài. Vinpearl Land Phú Quốc keeps delivering for families and couples who want resort-level comfort without driving into the main town crowd. items.placeName: Nala Spa - chợ đêm Phú Quốc

facebook.caption:
5.0 stars. 73 reviews. Zero exceptions.

Nala Spa sits inside chợ đêm Phú Quốc, and somehow every single person who walked in left a perfect score. That's not luck. That's consistency.

Right at Kiot 40, 42 Đ. Lê Lợi, it's the kind of spot you walk past thinking it's too casual, then your friend drags you in, and suddenly you get it.
